data.title: 国际服4周年特别登陆奖励
data.summary: [4th ANNIVERSARY Login Bonus!] Celebrate Blue Archive’s 4th ANNIVERSARY with a special login bonus!
data.body:
[4th ANNIVERSARY Login Bonus!]

Celebrate Blue Archive’s 4th ANNIVERSARY with a special login bonus! 🎉

Log in every day to receive not only Pyroxenes,
but also a special 4th Anniversary title!

Event Period:
11/8 (Sat) 7:00 PM ~ 12/2 (Tue) 01:59 AM (UTC)
* If you log in at least once during the event period, you can still participate until 12/9 (Tue) 01:59 AM (UTC).

➡️ Learn more: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3211954

#BlueArchive
![선택한사진4.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/17010/4WCqSjgmmAkfoUtlKNmpRSWXIQ3nnFAS.jpg)
